description: All colors must be drawn from the approved token palette.
check: Ensure every color reference maps to a token from tokens.json.

description: Typography must use approved font scales.
check: Validate type styles against heading and body token IDs.

description: The Pfizer or program logo must appear in navigation.
check: NavBar must render a logo region above the first fold.

description: Pages can only be composed from approved component IDs.
check: Every PageSpec componentId must exist in components.json.

description: All images must have alt text.
check: ImageBlock props.alt must be present and non-empty.

description: Color contrast ratio must be 4.5:1 minimum.
check: Foreground and background token pairings must meet WCAG AA.

description: Interactive elements must be keyboard accessible.
check: CTA and navigation links must expose visible focus states.

description: Body copy must render at 16px minimum.
check: Reject body tokens below body-md for default copy.

description: All data tables should expose captions for context.
check: DataTable caption prop must be populated.

description: ISI block required on all HCP pages.
check: US HCP and product-detail patterns must include an isi section with ISIBlock.

description: Footer must include an adverse event reporting link.
check: Footer adverseEventUrl prop must be non-empty.

description: All efficacy claims must have references.
check: Any claim-like content must pair with a ClaimReference component.
Campaign and product detail patterns must include a disclaimer component or disclosure region.

description: Risk information must be given equal prominence to benefit information.
check: Risk content cannot be visually de-emphasized relative to efficacy claims.

description: US pages must include FDA adverse event disclosure and PI access.
check: US market config requiredDisclosures must be surfaced in footer or disclaimer.

description: UK pages must align to ABPI code and Yellow Card reporting.
check: UK market config disclosures and additional rules must be applied.

description: EU pages must align to EFPIA expectations and EMA reporting.
check: EU market config disclosures and additional rules must be applied.
